description: LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Full-bleed dark navy/deep purple gradient background. Bold headline at top spanning full width. Left side has a vertical stack of 5 ingredient callouts, each with a small circular ingredient photo to its left and two lines of text (ingredient name in bold, benefit in lighter weight) to its right. Right-center area has a product image (metallic pouch/bag) angled slightly, taking up roughly 40% of the composition. A red rounded-rectangle CTA button sits at the bottom-right corner. PRODUCT: A dark branded pouch/packet (RYZE mushroom coffee) shown at a slight 3D angle, positioned center-right, occupying about 35-40% of the ad height. The pouch has a dark navy color with subtle branding. HEADLINE: 'NO MORE SLEEPLESS NIGHTS' in bold, large, all-caps white sans-serif font at the top of the ad, taking about 20% of the vertical space. Very high font weight (800+), tight letter-spacing. SUBTEXT: Five ingredient callouts stacked vertically on the left side: 'Reishi - Sweet Sleep', 'Cacao - Improved Blood Flow', 'Chicory - Digestive Support', 'Melatonin - Rest & Recovery', 'L-Theanine - Cognitive Function', 'Glycine - Deep Sleep'. Each ingredient name is in bold white, benefit text in lighter white/gray, smaller font. Small circular photos (~30px) of each ingredient to the left of each callout. CTA: 'TRY IT' in white text on a red/coral rounded-rectangle button, positioned at bottom-right corner. Button is approximately 80px wide by 35px tall with rounded corners (~8px radius). COLORS: Background is a deep navy-to-purple gradient (#1a1a3e to #2d1b4e). Text is white (#FFFFFF). CTA button is coral-red (#E84545). Ingredient photos have warm natural tones. SPACING: Generous padding (~20px) on all sides. Ingredient callouts have ~15px vertical spacing between them. MOOD: Calming, nighttime, wellness-focused. Premium health supplement feel with dark luxurious background suggesting nighttime use.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Left half is a lifestyle photo of a smiling bearded man in a blue button-down shirt, outdoors with autumn/blurred background. Right half is a white/light background with text content. The headline question spans the full width at the top over both halves. Below on the right side, 4 benefit bullet points are stacked vertically, each with bold key metric and regular-weight comparison text. A bold stat line sits at the very bottom. PRODUCT: No product packaging shown directly; this is a meal/nutrition service ad (Huel-style). The man holding the product is the visual. HEADLINE: 'Trying to eat healthier this year?' in a large dark serif or rounded sans-serif font, positioned at the top spanning the full width. Text is dark gray/black, approximately 22-26px equivalent, medium-bold weight. Has a casual, question-based conversational tone. SUBTEXT: Four benefit lines stacked on the right half, each starting with 'More' in bold: 'More protein than 5 eggs', 'More potassium than a banana', 'More omega-3 than two tins of sardines', 'More vitamin C than a small orange'. Each line has the key nutrient word in bold black and the comparison in regular weight gray. At the bottom: '34 meals for $2.50 per meal' in bold black, acting as the value proposition/CTA. CTA: The bottom text '34 meals for $2.50 per meal' serves as the CTA in bold dark text, no button shape. COLORS: Left half has warm autumn photography tones (oranges, greens, warm light). Right half is clean white (#FFFFFF) or very light gray (#F8F8F8). Text is dark charcoal (#2D2D2D) with bold portions in near-black (#1A1A1A). SPACING: Clean separation between photo and text area. Bullet points have ~12-15px vertical spacing. Comfortable padding (~20px) around text area. MOOD: Healthy, approachable, relatable. The smiling man creates trust. Clean minimalist right side contrasts with warm lifestyle photo. Informational and comparison-driven.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). White background at top and bottom, with a large overhead product photo (matcha in a cup) centered in the middle taking up about 50% of the ad. Bold headline at the very top, centered. Subtitle text below the headline. Six ingredient callouts arranged in two columns (3 per side) flanking the central cup image, each with a small circular ingredient photo and two lines of text. Brand logo at bottom-right corner. Green accent color on the left and right edges (partial green shapes/leaves framing the cup). PRODUCT: A top-down view of a matcha latte in a white cup, showing vibrant green matcha with foamy texture. The cup is centered and is the dominant visual element, roughly 45% of the frame. HEADLINE: 'ENERGY WITHOUT THE JITTERS' in bold, large, all-caps black sans-serif font centered at the top. Very heavy weight (800-900), approximately 28-32px equivalent. SUBTEXT: Below headline: 'Our organic matcha ceremonial blend, enriched with 6 functional mushrooms:' in regular weight, smaller dark gray text, centered. Six ingredient callouts in two columns: Left column - 'LION'S MANE for focus', 'REISHI for stress', 'TURKEY TAIL for gut health'. Right column - 'SHIITAKE for immunity', 'CORDYCEPS for stamina', 'KING TRUMPET for inflammation'. Each has a small circular photo (~35px) of the mushroom and the name in bold with benefit in lighter weight below. CTA: No explicit CTA button. Brand logo 'RYZE' at bottom-right serves as brand anchor. COLORS: Background is white (#FFFFFF). Headline text is black (#1A1A1A). Accent green from matcha and decorative elements (#5BA84B or similar bright green). Ingredient callout backgrounds are small white circles with subtle shadows. SPACING: Symmetric layout with equal spacing on both sides. Ingredient callouts spaced ~20px apart vertically. ~15px padding around edges. MOOD: Fresh, energetic, health-conscious. Clean and organized, educational layout. The vibrant green matcha is the visual anchor. Natural and organic feel.

LAYOUT: Vertical/portrait ad (approximately 4:5 ratio). Very light gray (#F5F5F5) background throughout. Brand logo at top-left corner. Large bold headline below the logo, left-aligned, taking about 20% of vertical space. Below headline, a numbered list of 5 steps in a slightly inset white card area. Bottom third shows a grid of 12 book covers arranged in 2 rows of 6, each with a 'DAY X' label above it. PRODUCT: Headway app (book summary service). No physical product; the 12 colorful book covers at the bottom serve as the product showcase, displayed in a neat 6x2 grid. Each book cover is small (~50x70px equivalent) with vibrant colors. HEADLINE: 'How to cope with a loss of a Loved One' in large, bold, black serif font, left-aligned. Approximately 28-32px equivalent. Mixed case with key words capitalized. SUBTEXT: A numbered list of 5 steps: '1. Stop scrolling.', '2. Take a few deep breaths.', '3. Download Headway.' (Headway in green), '4. Read books that will help you with your loss.', '5. Start living again!' - Key words in each line are bolded. Text is dark gray, regular weight, ~14-16px. The list appears on a white or very slightly raised card. CTA: No explicit CTA button. 'Download Headway' in step 3 is colored green (#4CAF50) as an inline text CTA. COLORS: Background is light gray (#F2F2F2). Text is near-black (#222222). Headway brand green (#4CAF50) used for the logo icon and 'Headway' text in step 3. Book covers provide pops of blue, yellow, pink, orange, and teal. Day labels have subtle backgrounds. SPACING: Generous top padding (~25px). List items have ~10px vertical spacing. Book grid has ~8px gaps between covers. Overall very airy and clean. MOOD: Empathetic, calming, supportive. The content addresses grief in a gentle, actionable way. Clean minimalist design creates a sense of peace and order. The colorful books at the bottom add warmth and hope.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Soft lavender/light purple gradient background with subtle vertical light streaks suggesting curtains or fabric. Product bottle centered at the bottom third. Handwritten-style headline at top spanning most of the width. Three annotation-style text callouts positioned around the product (left, right, and bottom-right) with no connecting lines, just spatial proximity. PRODUCT: A perfume/fragrance bottle centered at bottom, taking up about 30% of the ad height. The bottle has a clear/frosted glass body with a purple-to-clear gradient, a gold cap, and a white label reading 'The Fragrance Bar - GUILTY - EAU DE PARFUM - 1 FL OZ 30ML'. HEADLINE: 'This fragrance cause' in a large handwritten/script font in dark charcoal/black, positioned at the top-center. The word 'cause' is in a more elaborate cursive style, possibly in a slightly different color (yellow-gold accent). Approximately 28-36px equivalent for the main text. SUBTEXT: Three callout phrases positioned around the product: Top-right: 'when buying not robbing a bank' in a smaller sans-serif italic or regular font (~12px). Left-center: 'people asking what are you using' in similar style. Bottom-right: 'confident boost' in similar style. All in dark gray/charcoal text. These represent social-proof style benefits in a casual tone. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is a soft lavender/lilac gradient (#E8DBF0 to #F0E6F6) with soft white light streaks. Text is dark charcoal (#333333). Accent yellow/gold on the cursive 'cause' text (#D4A843). Product has purple glass and gold cap tones. SPACING: Product is centered with ample space around it. Callout texts are loosely positioned with ~30-40px from the product. Overall airy composition. MOOD: Feminine, playful, aspirational. The cursive headline and casual callouts create a social-media-native feel. Light purple tones evoke luxury and femininity. The tone is humorous and relatable.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Soft pink background (#FDE8E8 or similar). Headline at top in mixed fonts (script + bold sans-serif). Product bottle centered-left, taking up about 50% of the ad height. Three benefit callouts stacked vertically on the right side, each with pink/coral highlighted background strips behind the text. Small capsule/pill graphics scattered decoratively in the background. PRODUCT: A supplement bottle (Hormone Harmony) positioned center-left. Dark amber/brown glass-style bottle with a maroon/burgundy label, white cap. The bottle has a circular seal/logo emblem. About 45% of ad height. Small green capsules are scattered around the bottle as decorative elements. HEADLINE: 'I got my OLD ME AGAIN' at the top. 'I got my' is in a lighter script/handwriting font in coral/pink. 'OLD ME AGAIN' is in very bold, large, all-caps sans-serif font in coral/hot pink (#E85070). The bold text is approximately 32-38px equivalent with heavy weight (800+). SUBTEXT: Three benefit statements on the right side, each on a pink/coral highlight strip: 'Supports Weight Loss and Stops Fat Storage' (Weight Loss and Stops Fat Storage in bold), 'Relieves Symptoms of Hormone Imbalances Up To 87%' (87% emphasized), 'Calms Anxiety, Stress And Mood Swings' (Anxiety, Stress And Mood Swings in bold). Text is dark/black on pink highlight backgrounds. Each strip is slightly transparent pink. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is soft pink (#FDE0E5). Headline and highlight strips are coral/hot pink (#E8506F). Text on highlights is dark charcoal/black. Product bottle is dark brown/amber. Capsules are light green. SPACING: Product on left with ~15px from edge. Benefit callouts on right with ~12px vertical spacing between strips. Headline has ~20px top padding. MOOD: Empowering, feminine wellness. The testimonial-style headline creates relatability. Pink tones convey femininity and health. Scattered capsules add dynamism.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Warm orange (#E8884D) solid background. Massive bold headline text at the top, partially obscured by the product, creating a layered depth effect. Product (sunscreen spray bottle) positioned on the left side, angled, sitting on/emerging from a diamond/rhombus-shaped orange cutout element. A white rounded-rectangle features card on the right side lists 4 benefits with checkmark icons. Dark CTA bar at the bottom-right. PRODUCT: A bright orange sunscreen spray bottle (SPF 50) positioned on the left side at a slight angle, taking up about 40% of the ad width and 60% of the height. The bottle has 'SUN SCREEN 50 SPF' in large white bold text on its label. It sits within a deeper orange diamond/rotated-square shape that creates depth. HEADLINE: 'ULTIMATE SUNSCREEN' in extremely bold, massive all-caps white sans-serif font with dark outlines/shadows, positioned at the top. The text is partially behind the product bottle creating a layered/3D composition. Font size is approximately 48-60px equivalent, ultra-bold weight (900). SUBTEXT: A white rounded-rectangle card on the right side with 'FEATURES' header in a dark bar at the top, then 4 benefit lines each with a purple/pink checkmark icon: 'PREVENTS PREMATURE AGING', 'PROTECTS AGAINST SKIN CANCER', 'IMPROVES SKIN TEXTURE', 'HELPS PREVENT ACNE'. Text is dark gray, all caps, ~11px, medium weight. CTA: 'GET IT NOW!' in white bold text on a dark charcoal/near-black (#333333) rounded-rectangle button at the bottom-right of the features card. COLORS: Background is warm orange (#E8884D). Product is bright orange (#F5923A). Headline text is white with dark shadow. Features card is white (#FFFFFF) with dark header bar. Checkmarks are purple/magenta (#9C27B0). CTA button is dark charcoal (#333333). SPACING: Product overlaps headline creating depth. Features card has ~10px padding internally, ~8px between benefit lines. MOOD: Bold, energetic, summer vibes. The orange dominance creates warmth and sun association. The overlapping headline-product technique adds visual dynamism. Direct and benefit-focused.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Light beige/cream background (#F5EDE4). Product tube positioned on the left side, angled slightly, taking up about 40% of the width. Right side has large bold headline text and three benefit descriptions stacked vertically, each preceded by an orange horizontal line accent. Brand name 'Curology' at top-left corner in small text. PRODUCT: A dark navy blue squeeze tube (Curology Acne Cleanser) positioned on the left, angled at about 15 degrees. The tube has white text on dark blue packaging. It takes up roughly 35-40% of the ad width and about 70% of the height. Clean, pharmaceutical-grade aesthetic. HEADLINE: 'Meet the Acne Cleanser' in large, bold, dark navy sans-serif font on the right side. 'Meet the' is slightly smaller/lighter weight, 'Acne Cleanser' is bolder and larger. Approximately 24-30px for the main text. Dark navy color (#1B2A4A). SUBTEXT: Three benefit descriptions on the right, each preceded by a short orange horizontal line (~30px wide, 3px thick) as a visual bullet: 'Powered by 2.5% benzoyl peroxide-gentle enough for daily use', 'Milky gel texture designed for all skin types', 'Hydrates and soothes with glycerin and allantoin'. Text is dark navy, ~11-13px, regular weight. Key phrases are not bolded. CTA: No explicit CTA button. The brand name 'Curology' at top-left with a small 'C' icon serves as brand anchor. COLORS: Background is warm beige/cream (#F5EDE4). Product tube is dark navy (#1B2A4A). Text is dark navy matching the product. Orange accent lines (#E86830) serve as visual bullets. Small orange accent on the tube as well. SPACING: Product on left with ~15px padding from edge. Text on right with ~15px right padding. Benefit descriptions have ~18-20px vertical spacing. Orange line accents are ~5px above each benefit text block. MOOD: Clean, clinical, trustworthy. The dark navy and beige create a dermatologist-office feel. Minimalist and informative. Professional skincare positioning.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Light warm beige/cream background. A 2x2 grid of lifestyle photos takes up the central ~70% of the ad. Brand name centered at the top above the grid. Bold text labels on the right side and bottom of the grid, rotated and positioned along the edges. PRODUCT: Fashion brand (MAUVAIS) showing matching sets on a male model. Four lifestyle photos in a 2x2 grid show the same man in different matching set outfits (blue linen set, tan/olive set, etc.) posed near cars and palm trees. Each photo is roughly square with thin white borders/gaps between them (~4px). HEADLINE: 'SUMMER STATEMENT.' in large bold all-caps sans-serif font, rotated 90 degrees clockwise, positioned along the right edge of the photo grid. Dark charcoal text, approximately 24-28px, heavy weight (700-800). SUBTEXT: 'MATCHING SETS.' in large bold all-caps sans-serif font along the bottom edge, horizontally. Same style as the rotated text. Brand name 'MAUVAIS' at top-center in a refined, spaced-out sans-serif font, lighter weight (~14px). CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is warm cream/off-white (#F0E8DC). Photo grid has warm golden-hour tones (sunset oranges, warm whites, palm green). Text is dark charcoal/near-black (#2D2D2D). Thin white borders between photos. SPACING: ~15px padding on all sides. Photo grid gaps are ~4px. Text labels positioned right against the grid edges. Overall balanced and editorial. MOOD: Aspirational, summer lifestyle, editorial fashion. The warm-toned photos with cars and palms evoke luxury summer living. Clean grid layout feels magazine-like. Masculine and stylish.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio), small/compact thumbnail format. White background at top ~40% with bold text headline. Below that, a product showcase area with dark/colorful imagery showing multiple phone screens arranged in a fanned layout on a dark purple/pink gradient background. Brand logo (Headway) below the headline with a small icon. PRODUCT: The Headway app displayed on approximately 5-6 smartphone screens arranged in an overlapping fan/spread pattern, showing various app screens with colorful UI (pink, purple, yellow, orange gradients). The phones occupy the bottom 55% of the ad. HEADLINE: 'THE ULTIMATE SELF-GROWTH BIBLE' in bold, all-caps, dark charcoal sans-serif font at the top. Approximately 16-20px equivalent, heavy weight (700-800). Centered alignment. SUBTEXT: Brand identifier 'Headway' with a small green square icon, positioned below the headline and above the phone mockups. Small text, ~10-12px. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Top area is white (#FFFFFF). Headline text is dark charcoal (#2D2D2D). Phone screens show vibrant purple, pink, coral, and yellow gradients. Background behind phones is dark purple/navy. Headway icon is green (#4CAF50). SPACING: Compact layout with minimal padding (~10px). Headline is tightly set. Phone mockups are closely clustered. MOOD: Bold, aspirational, self-improvement focused. The vibrant phone screens create visual excitement. The 'BIBLE' word choice suggests comprehensiveness. Modern app-marketing aesthetic.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). A lifestyle photo fills the entire background showing a woman with curly brown hair smiling at the camera while holding up a product (wallet/card case) in one hand and a Stanley tumbler in the other. Five yellow star icons are positioned at the top-left corner. A testimonial quote in white handwriting-style text is overlaid on the lower-right portion of the photo. The photo has a slight darkened overlay to make text readable. PRODUCT: Two products visible: a small mint/sage green wallet or card case being held up by the woman in her right hand, and a sage green Stanley tumbler in her left hand. The wallet is the featured product, shown at about 15% of frame size. HEADLINE: Five yellow star icons (rating) at the top-left corner, approximately 12-15px each. SUBTEXT: Testimonial quote in white handwritten/script-style font overlaid on the photo: 'This is the perfect wallet to match my Stanley. I'm OBSESSED!' with attribution 'Kristin R.' below. The quote text is approximately 16-20px in a casual handwriting font. 'OBSESSED' appears emphasized. White text with subtle shadow for readability against the photo. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Photo has warm natural tones (brown hair, neutral clothing, sage green products). Stars are bright yellow (#FFD700). Quote text is white (#FFFFFF) with subtle drop shadow. Photo has slight warm filter. SPACING: Stars clustered at top-left with ~10px padding. Quote positioned at bottom-right with ~15px padding from edges. Overall the photo dominates with text as overlay. MOOD: Authentic, user-generated content feel. The real person holding the product creates genuine social proof. The handwritten font reinforces authenticity. Warm and relatable, like a friend's recommendation.

LAYOUT: Vertical/portrait ad (approximately 4:5 ratio). Light gray (#F0F0F0) background. The entire ad is designed to look like an Instagram DM/message conversation screenshot. A message bubble at the top contains text and two side-by-side before/after photos. Below the photos is a share/send icon. Below that is the sender name with a small circular avatar. At the very bottom, small disclaimer text in light gray. PRODUCT: JS Health Detox & Debloat supplement (not shown directly; referenced in the message text). The before/after transformation photos are the key visual, showing a woman's body profile in two side-by-side photos (before in olive green outfit, after in hot pink outfit). HEADLINE: No traditional headline. The message text serves as the headline: 'Hi JS Health, just want to show you 3 months progress of change of diet, exercise & using JS Health Dextox & Debloat.' in dark text within a light gray message bubble. SUBTEXT: Sender attribution: 'Kristy xx' with a small circular avatar photo next to it, positioned below the message bubble. Disclaimer at very bottom in tiny light gray text (~8px): 'Individual results may vary. Always read the label and follow the directions for use. Detox + Debloat relieves fullness + reduces abdominal bloating, based on traditional Western herbal medicine.' CTA: No explicit CTA button. A small paper-plane/share icon is positioned to the right of the photos suggesting the DM forward action. COLORS: Background is light gray (#EEEEEE). Message bubble is slightly lighter gray (#F5F5F5) or white. Text is dark charcoal (#333333). Before photo outfit is olive green, after photo outfit is hot pink. Disclaimer text is light gray (#AAAAAA). SPACING: Message bubble has ~15px internal padding. Before/after photos are side by side with ~5px gap. ~20px padding on sides. ~15px between elements vertically. MOOD: Authentic, social proof, organic/UGC feel. Designed to look like a real Instagram DM, which creates trust and authenticity. The transformation photos provide powerful visual proof. Intimate and personal tone.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Clean white background at top ~15% for brand name. Main area has a large product bottle on the left side (~40% width) with a decorative draped green/white waffle-texture towel behind it. Right side has headline text and three benefit callouts stacked vertically, each preceded by a small leaf/droplet icon. Brand name centered at the very top. PRODUCT: A tall body wash pump bottle (Naturium Multi Vitamin Daily Nutrients Body Wash) positioned on the left side. The bottle has a sage/teal green label with white text, and a white pump dispenser top. It sits partially in front of a draped waffle-weave towel. The bottle takes up about 35% of the width and 65% of the height. HEADLINE: 'Indulge In Your Body Care Routine' in a large elegant serif font, dark green/charcoal color, positioned on the right side. Mixed case, approximately 22-26px, medium weight. SUBTEXT: Three benefit lines on the right, each with a small decorative leaf/droplet icon: 'Cleanses While Maintaining Moisture', 'Maintains Healthy-Looking Skin', 'Perfect for All Skin Types'. Dark green/charcoal text, ~12-14px, regular weight. Brand name 'NATURIUM' at the very top center in spaced-out uppercase serif/sans-serif font, ~12px, dark green. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is white (#FFFFFF) transitioning to very light sage at edges. Brand and text color is dark forest green (#2D4A3E). Product label is sage/teal green (#6B9E8A). Towel is white/cream with subtle green waffle texture. Leaf icons are dark green. SPACING: Product on left with ~15px edge padding. Text on right with ~15px right padding. Benefit callouts have ~20px vertical spacing. Brand name at top with ~15px top padding. MOOD: Spa-like, clean, natural luxury. The waffle towel and green tones evoke a bathroom/spa setting. Elegant serif headline adds sophistication. Fresh and nourishing feel.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Dark charcoal/near-black background (#1A1A1A). Brand logo centered at the top. Below that, two columns divided by a thin vertical line. Left column shows the competitor product (traditional wool socks), right column shows the brand product (Hollow alpaca socks). Each column has a header text, product image, and label below. A bold tagline spans the full width at the bottom in an accent color. Large faded watermark text 'HOLLOW' in very dark gray behind everything. PRODUCT: Comparison layout. Left side: a pair of olive/khaki traditional wool socks, slightly rumpled/used looking. Right side: a single gray Hollow-branded alpaca sock, shown neatly with a visible black logo tab. Both sock images are approximately the same size, centered in their respective columns. HEADLINE: Top headers for each column: Left - 'Warm for 2 Hours' in white sans-serif, regular weight. Right - 'Warm for 8+ Hours' in an accent color (yellow/gold #E8B84D or warm amber), same font size, suggesting superiority. Both approximately 18-22px. SUBTEXT: Bottom labels under each product: Left - 'Traditional Wool Socks' in white, ~12px. Right - 'Hollow Alpaca Socks' in white, ~12px. Bottom tagline spanning full width: '3X WARMER THAN SHEEPS WOOL' in yellow/gold accent color (#E8B84D), all caps, spaced-out tracking, approximately 16-18px, medium weight. Brand logo 'HOLLOW' at top center in bold white, ~16px, with distinctive double-L design. COLORS: Background is dark charcoal/near-black (#1A1A1A to #222222). Primary text is white (#FFFFFF). Accent color is warm gold/amber (#E8B84D) for the superior claim and bottom tagline. Faint watermark 'HOLLOW' in very dark gray (#2A2A2A). Product colors are olive/khaki (left) and light gray (right). CTA: No explicit CTA button. SPACING: Two equal columns with a thin vertical divider line. ~20px top/bottom padding. ~15px between text and product images. Tagline has ~15px bottom padding. MOOD: Premium, technical, comparison-driven. The dark background creates a premium masculine feel. The side-by-side comparison with highlighted superiority metrics is persuasive. Bold and confident positioning.

LAYOUT: Horizontal/rectangular ad (approximately 3:1 or 4:1 wide ratio, like a social media comment/review screenshot). White background. A user avatar (small circular photo, ~30px) at the left with the reviewer name beside it. Below that, the full review text spans the width. A row of 5 yellow stars appears at the top or near the name. The overall design mimics a Facebook or social media review/comment format. PRODUCT: Not directly shown. This is a pure text testimonial ad for a skincare product (appears to be an acne patch/treatment). The reviewer 'Rebecca' has a small circular profile photo showing a woman with curly brown hair. HEADLINE: No traditional headline. The reviewer name 'Rebecca' in bold, ~13px, serves as the attribution. Five yellow stars indicate the rating. SUBTEXT: The full review text: 'OMG - this has truly changed my life. I have struggled with stand-off since I was a teenager, I've been to the doctor more than once. Then I saw a Facebook ad for Ari and Acne, I decided to try The...' (text continues but is truncated with 'Read more'). The text is in regular weight dark gray, ~12-13px, standard system font appearance. There are interaction indicators like a timestamp and 'Read more' link. CTA: 'Read more' as a subtle text link at the end of the truncated review. COLORS: Background is white (#FFFFFF). Text is dark gray/charcoal (#333333). Stars are bright yellow (#FFD700). 'Read more' link may be in blue or gray. Very minimal color palette mimicking a real social media post. SPACING: Small avatar with ~8px gap to name. ~5px between name and review text. Overall compact, mimicking real social media spacing. ~10px padding on sides. MOOD: Authentic, raw, social proof. Designed to look exactly like a real Facebook review screenshot, maximizing credibility. The emotional, personal language ('changed my life', 'OMG') creates powerful social proof. Unpolished and genuine.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Split into two zones: top ~25% has a white/light background with the testimonial quote, bottom ~75% has a warm golden-yellow background (#E8C84D) with two overlapping swimsuit products and four benefit callouts positioned around them. The callouts are arranged in four corners around the products with small text. PRODUCT: Two one-piece swimsuits overlapping in the center-bottom area. One is bright blue (left/behind), one is black (right/front). Both have racerback/athletic styling with the Speedo logo visible. They take up about 40% of the ad area, displayed flat/laid out rather than on a model. HEADLINE: Testimonial quote at the top in dark text on white/light background: '"I'm a curvy girl who loves to swim. This suit is perfect."' in a large serif or elegant sans-serif font, approximately 20-24px. The phrase 'This suit is perfect.' is in bold. Enclosed in quotation marks. SUBTEXT: Four benefit callouts positioned around the swimsuits: Top-left: 'Supports and covers chest', Top-right: 'Wide crossed straps provide secure and comfortable fit', Bottom-left: 'Resists effects of lotions, oils, and chlorine', Bottom-right: 'Lasts 5-10x longer than ordinary swimwear'. All in dark charcoal text, ~11-13px, regular weight. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Top zone is white/off-white (#FFFFFF). Bottom zone is warm golden yellow (#E8C84D or #F0C040). Swimsuit colors are bright royal blue (#2060CC) and black (#1A1A1A). Text is dark charcoal (#2D2D2D). SPACING: Quote has ~15px padding. Swimsuits centered with ~30px from edges. Callouts positioned ~15px from their respective corners, ~10px from the products. MOOD: Inclusive, body-positive, functional. The testimonial from a curvy swimmer creates relatability. The golden-yellow background is warm and inviting. Product-focused with practical benefit callouts. Empowering and confident.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Split background: top ~30% is warm orange/red-orange (#E85C30), bottom ~70% is a deeper burnt orange (#D4522A). Large testimonial quote in bold text at the top. Three product boxes arranged in a row across the lower portion, each at a slight angle. Small text callout labels with arrows pointing to each product box. PRODUCT: Three boxes of 'Flings' brand snack pastries/toaster pastries arranged in a horizontal row. Left box appears chocolate flavored (dark brown/maroon packaging), center box is red (strawberry), right box is white/cream (possibly vanilla or birthday cake). Each box is angled slightly and takes up about 25% of the width. HEADLINE: '"TASTES BETTER THAN POP-TARTS & ONLY 1G SUGAR!"' in very large, bold, all-caps white handwritten/marker-style font at the top. Enclosed in quotation marks to indicate a testimonial. Approximately 28-36px, heavy weight. The text is slightly irregular/hand-drawn looking. SUBTEXT: Four callout labels with curved arrows pointing to the products: 'High Protein, Low Carb' (pointing to one box), '100% Happiness Guaranteed' (lower-left), 'Gluten-Free & Keto Friendly' (lower-right). Each callout is in white text, ~11-13px, with a hand-drawn curved arrow connecting it to the relevant product. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is bright orange to burnt orange gradient (#E85C30 to #CC4420). Quote text is white (#FFFFFF). Product boxes are maroon/chocolate, red, and white/cream. Callout text is white with black arrows. SPACING: Quote takes up top 30% with ~15px padding. Products are arranged in a slight arc across the lower section. Callouts are positioned around products with ~10px spacing. MOOD: Fun, bold, snack-brand energy. The orange background pops with energy. The hand-drawn quote style feels authentic and social-media native. Playful and irreverent comparison to Pop-Tarts. Energetic and youthful.

LAYOUT: Small square ad (1:1 ratio, compact/thumbnail). Soft purple/lavender gradient background. Headline in white handwritten/script font at the top with small sparkle/star decorations. Product image (hand holding a snack bar) in the center-right area. Three small benefit callouts stacked vertically on the left side in white text with small icons. A bold 'NEW' badge in the bottom-right corner with flavor name. PRODUCT: A hand holding a crispy/chewy snack bar (appears to be a rice crispy treat or marshmallow bar) from the right side. The bar is golden/tan colored with visible texture. Takes up about 35% of the frame. HEADLINE: 'I can''t believe it' in white handwritten/script font at the top, with small star/sparkle decorations around it. Approximately 20-24px, casual script style. Positive, surprised tone. SUBTEXT: Three benefit callouts stacked on the left: '1g sugar', '1-2g net carbs', '11g protein'. Each preceded by a small icon/bullet. White text, ~10-12px. 'NEW MARSHMALLOW FLAVOR' badge in the bottom-right in bold white and purple text with 'NEW' being extra large and bold in purple/magenta (#9C27B0). CTA: No explicit CTA button. The 'NEW' flavor badge acts as the attention-grabber. COLORS: Background is soft purple/lavender gradient (#C4A0D8 to #B088C8). Text is white (#FFFFFF). 'NEW' badge text is purple/magenta (#9C27B0) or white on purple. Snack bar is golden/tan. Sparkle decorations are white/light yellow. SPACING: Compact layout with ~8-10px padding. Benefit callouts stacked with ~6px spacing. NEW badge positioned at bottom-right with ~10px from edges. MOOD: Excited, indulgent-yet-healthy, playful. The script font and sparkles convey delight and surprise. Purple tones feel fun and slightly indulgent. The macro callouts (low sugar, high protein) balance indulgence with health. Social-media native feel.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Light gray/off-white background (#F0F0F0). The layout is split into two zones: left ~55% shows a full-length lifestyle/product photo (woman's lower body wearing hot pink leggings), and right ~45% shows two circular detail/close-up photos stacked vertically with descriptive text labels next to each. The overall composition emphasizes product details through zoomed-in crops. PRODUCT: Hot pink/magenta athletic leggings shown on a model's lower body (waist to feet, with white sneakers). The main photo on the left shows the full product from behind. Two circular detail photos on the right show: top circle - a close-up of the ruched/gathered 'peach butt' seam detail, bottom circle - a close-up of the ribbed waistband 'belly control' feature. HEADLINE: No traditional headline. The feature labels serve as the primary text. SUBTEXT: Two feature callout labels on the right side next to each circular detail photo: 'peach butt' in bold, casual lowercase font (~16-18px) next to the top circle, and 'belly control' in the same style (~16-18px) next to the bottom circle. Text is dark charcoal/black. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is light gray (#F0F0F0). Product is vibrant hot pink/magenta (#E8308A). Text is dark charcoal (#2D2D2D). Sneakers are white. Circular detail photos have thin borders or shadow. SPACING: Main photo fills the left 55% edge-to-edge vertically. Circular detail photos are ~80px diameter, stacked with ~25px vertical gap. Feature labels are ~10px to the right of each circle. Overall clean with moderate spacing. MOOD: Trendy, body-confident, detail-oriented. The hot pink color is bold and eye-catching. The zoomed detail crops educate the customer on specific design features. Athletic and feminine.

LAYOUT: Square ad (1:1 ratio). Bold blue gradient background (#4A7CE8 to #3060CC) fills the entire frame. Large elegant headline text at the top in white, spanning full width. Product package centered in the middle, placed on a white rectangular card/surface that provides contrast. Three benefit callouts in dark rounded-pill/capsule shapes positioned around the product (left, right, bottom-right). Cloud graphics at the bottom corners and right side add a dreamy/sleep atmosphere. PRODUCT: A product pouch/bag (Hostage Mouth Tape) centered on a white rectangular surface. The pouch is white/light gray with a graphic of a face/eyes and a black mouth tape strip, plus bold 'HOSTAGE MOUTHTAPE' branding. The header reads 'BREATHE BETTER. SLEEP BETTER. 30 Day Supply'. The pouch takes up about 35% of the ad area. HEADLINE: 'Life Changing Sleep Awaits...' in large, elegant white serif font at the top, spanning full width. Approximately 32-40px, medium weight (400-500). Mixed case with ellipsis creating anticipation. Slight text shadow for depth against the blue background. SUBTEXT: Three benefit callouts in dark rounded-pill/capsule-shaped badges with white all-caps text: 'WORKS WITH A BEARD' (left side), 'IMPROVED NEXT DAY ENERGY' (right side), 'BETTER NIGHTS SLEEP' (bottom-right). Each badge is a dark charcoal/black (#222222) rounded rectangle with white text, ~11-13px, bold weight. The badges are positioned around the product at various angles. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is vivid blue gradient (#4A7CE8 to #3060CC). Headline text is white (#FFFFFF). Product pouch is white/light gray. Benefit badges are dark charcoal/near-black (#222222) with white text. Cloud graphics are soft white with slight transparency. White rectangular card behind product provides contrast. SPACING: Headline at top with ~20px padding. Product centered with ~30px from sides. Benefit badges positioned ~15px from the product with varied placement around it. Clouds at bottom with ~0px bottom padding (bleeding off edge). MOOD: Calming, aspirational, sleep-wellness. The blue gradient evokes nighttime sky and calm. Clouds reinforce the sleep/dream atmosphere. The serif headline font adds elegance. Bold product claims in dark badges create contrast and authority against the serene background.
